title: Gemini Ganeshanum Suruli Raajanum
subTitle: Gemini Ganesan, a playboy, falls in love with four different women and promises to marry them. Years later, his fiancée asks him to apologise to his ex-girlfriends and invite them to their wedding.

title: Azhagi
subTitle: Sundari, a widow, raises her three children, Natraj, Mathi and Surya with love and support amidst several hardships. But, things turn bad in the family when Natraj gets married to a rich girl.
